prompt: Style the empty-state component for when a user has no recipes yet. It lives at src/app/pages/recipe-builder/components/empty-state/empty-state.component.scss. Show centered content: an icon area at the top, a heading, a short description line, and a call-to-action button area below.

assertions.text: Output uses var(--color-text-muted) or var(--color-text-muted-light) for description text
Output uses glass surface tokens (var(--bg-glass) or var(--blur-glass))
Output does not contain hardcoded muted colors (#666, #999, #aaa, color: #)
Output uses logical spacing (padding-block, padding-inline, margin-block)
With-skill agent discovers existing .c-empty-state or .c-glass-card engine class and composes from it instead of reinventing
Output applies Five-Group Vertical Rhythm with clear group separation
